summary: Tested MoltBot CRM new features: Gmail Integration, Voice-to-CRM, Lead Scoring, Churn Alerts, Analytics PDF, Multi-platform Preview, Hashtag Suggestions. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Gmail section visible with Connect button.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed LLM import: Changed from 'emergentintegrations.llm.google.GeminiChat' to 'emergentintegrations.llm.chat.LlmChat' - the google module doesn't exist
Fixed Voice-to-CRM endpoint to accept JSON body with VoiceToCRMRequest model
Removed .with_model() calls as they cause model name errors - default model works correctly
seed_data_creation: Voice-to-CRM tests created test contacts and tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: Gmail OAuth (returns authorization URL), Voice-to-CRM (AI analysis creates contacts/tasks), Lead Scoring (grades A-F), Churn Alerts, Analytics PDF/JSON, Multi-platform Preview, Hashtag Suggestions. Login URL is /admin/login not /login.

Gmail Integration.GET /api/moltbot/gmail/auth: PASS - Returns Google OAuth URL with full Gmail scope
Gmail Integration.UI Gmail Section: PASS - Visible on MoltBot page with Connect button

Voice-to-CRM.POST /api/audio/voice-to-crm: PASS - AI analyzes text and creates CRM entries
Voice-to-CRM.Contact Creation: PASS - Creates contacts from voice commands
Voice-to-CRM.Task Creation: PASS - Creates tasks from voice commands

Lead Scoring.GET /api/analytics/lead-scores: PASS - Returns all leads with scores 0-100 and grades A-F
Lead Scoring.GET /api/analytics/lead-score/{id}: PASS - Returns score for specific contact
Lead Scoring.Score Factors: PASS - Includes has_email, has_phone, has_company, recent_contact

Churn Alerts.GET /api/analytics/churn-alerts: PASS - Returns alerts with risk levels

Analytics Dashboard.GET /api/analytics/dashboard: PASS - Returns leads, clients, revenue stats

Analytics Reports.GET /api/reports/analytics-json: PASS - Returns period, revenue, leads, clients, tasks

Multi-platform Preview.POST /api/social/preview: PASS - Generates previews for Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter
Multi-platform Preview.GET /api/social/platform-info: PASS - Returns all platform configs with limits

fixes_applied.issue: Same import error + Voice-to-CRM not accepting JSON body
fixes_applied.fix: Fixed import and changed endpoint to accept VoiceToCRMRequest model

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Gmail OAuth requires user authorization via Google. Voice-to-CRM uses real AI analysis.
